name: nl
readme:
Short:        Line numbering filter
Type:         util/cli
Architecture: m68k-amigaos >= 3.0
Uploader:     duncan (at) bowring (dot) us
Author:       OpenBSD (ported by Duncan Bowring)
Version:      1.8

nl - Line numbering filter

Original author: OpenBSD
Ported by Duncan Bowring using amiport (AI-assisted porting toolkit).
Project: https://github.com/bdgscotland/amiport

Cross-compiled with bebbo-gcc for AmigaOS 3.x (68000+).
Tested via vamos emulator and FS-UAE with Workbench 3.1.

Standalone binary, no ixemul.library needed (-noixemul).

Includes full source code (original POSIX and ported Amiga versions)
and PORT.md documenting every transformation applied.
porting_notes: OpenBSD nl 1.8 ported to AmigaOS 3.x. 42/42 FS-UAE tests pass. Standard amiport transformations: argv expansion, Amiga exit codes, stack cookie 16384.
